mcp_servers.name: context7
mcp_servers.purpose: Library documentation lookup (Next.js, Zustand, Framer Motion, shadcn/ui, WXT, webextension-polyfill)

mcp_servers.name: ctxai
mcp_servers.purpose: Package safety validation and project dependency context (check for hallucinated packages/methods)

mcp_servers.name: github
mcp_servers.purpose: GitHub operations: push code, create branches, pull requests, issues

mcp_servers.name: playwright
mcp_servers.purpose: Browser automation for UI testing and verification via Playwright MCP

note: Playwright MCP server is installed locally. Connect it in your Claude Code MCP settings if it does not auto-connect from this registry.
